ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "geo_region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location */,
  "health_facilities_count" INTEGER /* Number of health facilities in the location */,
  "nearest_major_city" TEXT /* Name of the nearest major city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "borders" (
  "border_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each border */,
  "border_name" TEXT /* Name of the border region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the border and its relevance */,
  "border_length" REAL /* Length of the border in kilometers */,
  "border_type" TEXT /* Type of border (e.g., land, sea, air) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("border_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 0-18, 19-65, 65+) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the group */,
  "age_group_size" INTEGER /* Number of individuals in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender category */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender classification */,
  "gender_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of this gender in the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Winter, Spring, Summer, Fall) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seasonal characteristics */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the season */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Average precipitation during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number in the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the week */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yearly_statistics" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the year record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported during the year */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population counted during the year */,
  "average_prevalence" REAL /* Average prevalence rate for the year */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate for the year */,
  "vaccination_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "health_spending" REAL /* Total health spending for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
